args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%street_hype%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%streethype%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%street_hype%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%streethype%';

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;
